description_long: This chaise features a striking, sculptural design composed of a series of closely spaced, rib-like slats that form a continuous, undulating surface. The structure gently curves inward at the center, creating a natural dip for ergonomic lounging, while the ends flare outward, suggesting head and foot support. The slats are evenly spaced, allowing light and air to pass through, and the overall form is both organic and modern, reminiscent of parametric furniture design. The material appears to be a light-colored wood or engineered wood, giving it a warm, natural appearance. There are no visible armrests or traditional legs; instead, the entire chaise rests on its own continuous base formed by the slats. The open, airy construction makes it visually lightweight and suitable for contemporary urban parks or public spaces.
description: A modern, ribbed wooden chaise with a continuous, undulating form and open slat construction, designed for ergonomic lounging in urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and the hourglass-like inward curve at the center, with the ribbed slats clearly visible.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the narrow profile and the layered, stacked appearance of the slats, with the chaise's width at its minimum.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the full length and the symmetrical, undulating shape of the chaise.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, again showing the narrow profile and the vertical stacking of the slats.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is integrated into the continuous, undulating form of the chaise, rising gently at one end with a smooth, curved profile. It is composed of the same ribbed slats as the rest of the structure, providing visual continuity and a modern, open aesthetic.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present; the sides are open and follow the flowing contour of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: There are no distinct legs; the chaise is supported by its own continuous, ribbed base that runs the full length of the object, providing stability and a sculptural appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the surface consists of exposed, evenly spaced wooden slats with a natural, unpatterned finish.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seating surface is formed entirely by the ribbed wooden slats, with no additional padding or layering.
